messages.content: Hello, what can you help me with?
I want to build a simple calculator that can add and subtract numbers.
List the files in the project workspace for me.
What did I just tell you?

plan.description: Analyze the requirement to understand the need for generating an initial executable plan from the given requirement.

interface.name: analyze_requirement
interface.description: Analyze the requirement text to extract key components, objectives, and constraints for plan generation.

plan.description: Design a plan generation module that can parse requirement details and produce structured executable steps.

interface.name: PlanGenerator
interface.description: Class that parses requirement details and produces structured executable steps. Initializes with requirement analysis data.

extra_interfaces.name: generate_plan
extra_interfaces.description: Instance method of PlanGenerator that produces the structured plan matching the required JSON schema.

plan.description: Implement the plan generation logic to output a JSON structure matching the required schema.

interface.name: generate_plan_structure
interface.description: Core logic that transforms requirement components into a JSON structure matching the required schema for executable steps.

plan.description: Create a main entry point that triggers the plan generation for requirement R001.

interface.name: main
interface.description: Main entry point that orchestrates requirement analysis and plan generation, returning the final plan JSON.

plan.description: Test the plan generation by running the executable and validating the output against the schema.

interface.name: test_plan_generation
interface.description: Test function that validates the generated plan against the required schema and checks for structural correctness.

extra_interfaces.name: validate_schema
extra_interfaces.description: Helper function to validate JSON data against a JSON schema definition.

requirements.title: Hello, what can you help me wi
requirements.description: Hello, what can you help me with?
acceptance_criteria: Generate an initial executable plan from this requirement

progress_text: 当前进度：接口定义已补全，等待确认执行。

pending_approvals.title: Execute plan
pending_approvals.description: Plan is ready. Approve to start execution.
pending_approvals.reason: Plan and interface definitions are complete.
